scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w server
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w server
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client -- --base /needs-two/ && gh-pages -d client/dist
